articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Madison Square Garden wedding starts soon
articles.description:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding is fast approaching at Madison Square Garden

The post Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Madison Square Garden wedding starts soon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding is set at Madison Square Garden.
The event is expected to attract significant media attention and fans.
Local businesses may benefit from increased tourism during the wedding weekend.

articles.title: Celtics, Neemias Queta reportedly agree to four-year extension
articles.description:
Boston picked up Queta's option for next season, and added four more years in a new extension through 2030-31.

The post Celtics, Neemias Queta reportedly agree to four-year extension appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics extend Neemias Queta's contract for four years through 2030-31.
Boston exercised Queta's option for the upcoming season, ensuring his presence next year.
Queta's extension strengthens the Celtics' roster, impacting local fan engagement and team performance.
